_note: Editions landing page — handloom product launch. CMS-liftable.

hero.title: The loom that knows you.
hero.subtitle: Every thread, every pattern, every sale — from one platform designed for the hands that make. 40+ updates to weave, sell, and grow.

sections.label: Weave
sections.heading: The only platform you need across every AI channel

cards.title: Your products, woven for AI
cards.body: Jaal Yantra structures every thread — colours, material, weave, origin — so AI agents discover your work naturally. Syndicated data drives 2× more discovery in AI chats.

cards.title: Checkout from any conversation
cards.body: Customers buy directly in Copilot, WhatsApp, and Meta ads. Powered by the Universal Commerce Protocol with Shop Pay, right inside the conversation.

cards.title: Open protocol for craft commerce
cards.body: Build agentic shopping experiences from discovery to purchase with Catalog, Cart, and Checkout APIs. Open for every platform to build on.

cards.title: Sponsored listings in AI
cards.body: Earn revenue when your products are surfaced in agentic experiences. Developer preview coming soon.

sections.label: Studio
sections.heading: Your AI-powered companion for the craft

cards.title: Design with intention
cards.body: Describe the weave you envision — our AI suggests patterns, colourways, and material blends that honour traditional techniques while exploring new possibilities.

cards.title: Pattern library, digital
cards.body: Preserve your family of patterns. Store, version, and share weaving blueprints across your studio. Never lose a generation of knowledge.

cards.title: Smart material planning
cards.body: Know exactly how much thread, dye, and raw material each order needs. No waste, no shortage — just the right amount, every time.

cards.title: Voice notes to orders
cards.body: Dictate order notes, weave instructions, or quality observations in your language. The studio transcribes and structures it automatically.

sections.label: Storefront
sections.heading: A storefront that travels as far as your thread

cards.title: One store, every surface
cards.body: Your handloom catalogue — live on your own website, WhatsApp, Instagram, and AI channels simultaneously. Update once, sell everywhere.

cards.title: Rich product storytelling
cards.body: Show the hands behind the weave. Photos of the loom, the dyer, the weaver. Buyers connect with the maker, not just the product.

cards.title: Wholesale, direct
cards.body: Let boutiques and interior designers order in bulk with trade pricing, minimums, and lead times — all managed from the same dashboard.

cards.title: Virtual try-on for fabric
cards.body: Buyers upload a photo of their space and see your fabric draped on furniture, walls, or garments — before they order.

cards.title: In-person, connected
cards.body: Your physical workshop becomes a showroom. QR codes on every swatch link to the full catalogue, reviews, and re-order. Walk-ins become repeat buyers.

cards.title: Pop-up anywhere
cards.body: Take your store to exhibitions, melas, and trade shows with a mobile-optimised checkout that works offline. Accept payments on the spot.

cards.title: Workshop bookings
cards.body: Let visitors book loom demonstrations, dyeing workshops, or studio tours directly from your storefront. Build community around the craft.

cards.title: Local pickup & delivery
cards.body: Offer local pickup from your workshop or schedule delivery through our logistics partners. Real-time tracking for every order.

sections.label: Stories
sections.heading: Sell more by telling your story better

cards.title: Visual storytelling engine
cards.body: Create rich media galleries — photos, videos, loom sounds — that bring the making process to life. Every product becomes a story.

cards.title: AI-generated descriptions
cards.body: Describe your weave once in your own words. Our AI generates product descriptions for every channel, in every language, in your voice.

cards.title: Origin tracing for buyers
cards.body: Every product carries a digital passport: who wove it, where the cotton was grown, which natural dye was used. Radical transparency builds trust.

cards.title: Reviews that build reputation
cards.body: Buyers leave reviews with photos of your fabric in their home. Each review becomes a portfolio piece that sells your next creation.

sections.label: Supply
sections.heading: From fibre to fabric, fully traceable

cards.title: Raw material marketplace
cards.body: Source certified organic cotton, natural dyes, and handspun yarn directly from producers. Each batch tracked from farm to loom.

cards.title: Inventory that thinks ahead
cards.body: Predictive stock management learns your weaving cycles. It suggests when to reorder thread, how much dye to prepare, and which weaves to schedule.

cards.title: Order tracking for artisans
cards.body: Every order — from raw material to finished fabric — has a timeline. Know exactly where each piece is in the weaving process.

cards.title: Quality checklists, digital
cards.body: Define quality standards for each weave type. Inspectors check off criteria on their phone. Consistent quality, every batch.

cards.title: Instant payouts for artisans
cards.body: Get paid as soon as an order ships. No waiting 30 days. No bank account needed — receive via UPI, mobile wallet, or cash pickup.

cards.title: Working capital for weavers
cards.body: Access micro-loans based on your order history and reputation. Fund raw material purchases, loom repairs, or studio expansion.

cards.title: Fair pricing calculator
cards.body: Our tool calculates the true cost of every weave — materials, labour hours, overhead, and a fair margin. Price with confidence.

cards.title: Tax & compliance simplified
cards.body: GST filings, TDS, and export documentation generated automatically. Focus on weaving, not paperwork.

sections.label: Build
sections.heading: Build for the weaver, on the weaver’s platform

cards.title: Open APIs for craft
cards.body: Every feature is available via API. Build custom storefronts, inventory tools, or marketplace integrations on top of Jaal Yantra.

cards.title: Webhook events
cards.body: Listen to order events, inventory changes, and payout confirmations. Build reactive workflows that respond to your studio in real time.

cards.title: Theme development kit
cards.body: Create custom storefront themes using our liquid-based template language. Full control over every pixel of the buying experience.

cards.title: Community plugins
cards.body: Publish and discover plugins built by the Jaal Yantra community. From custom shipping calculators to WhatsApp integrations.

cta.title: Ready to weave your future?
cta.body: Join thousands of artisans, studios, and brands already using Jaal Yantra to bring handcrafted commerce to every channel.
